prompt: /answer-simple "After deploying v0.2.5 (see Wave 14 in foo-bar spec), migrate Adapter X to new FR-8 semantics — this depends on FR-3 from baz-quux"

assertions.text: Output identifies 'foo-bar' as internal spec reference
Output identifies 'baz-quux' as internal spec reference
BYTE-FAITHFUL: does NOT invent 'Adapter X связывает с внешним API' or 'FR-3 описывает контракт' or 'v0.2.5 большая работа инфраструктуры' (Правило 1)
